tasks.label: Commit and push sanitized tasks.json
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; $git='C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; & $git add .vscode/tasks.json; if (& $git diff --cached --name-only | Select-String -Quiet '\.vscode/tasks.json') { & $git commit -m 'Sanitize .vscode/tasks.json: remove embedded credentials' } else { Write-Host 'No staged changes for .vscode/tasks.json' }; & $git push -u origin main"
